message:
test: add practical-finish checkpoint, opportunity matrix, parameter sweeps, and extension remediation backlog gates with comprehensive validation

bench_scenario_runner.rs:
- Extract monolithic test into focused assertion helpers (collect_benchmarked_extensions,
  assert_matrix_rows, assert_records_have_schema, etc.) and per-record structural
  validators (assert_record_structure, assert_protocol_and_partition_contract,
  assert_env_fingerprint_fields, assert_scenario_metadata_fields,
  assert_matrix_scenario_structure) — removes two #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]

ci_full_suite_gate.rs:
- Add gate 16: practical-finish checkpoint (bd-3ar8v.6.9) — loads open PERF-3X
  issues from beads tracker with fallback to snapshot JSONL, evaluates blocking
  criteria, emits checkpoint report artifact
- Add gate 17: extension remediation backlog validation — schema, summary totals
  coherence, entry structure validation
- Add gate 18: opportunity matrix integrity — readiness coherence, ranked
  opportunity row structure (priority_score, confidence, effort, user_impact),
  monotonic ranking, lineage traceability
- Add gate 19: parameter sweeps integrity — readiness coherence, selected_defaults
  for core knobs, sweep_plan dimensions coverage, source identity linkage
- Add coverage audit report emission with structured artifact output
- Add ~30 new tests covering all contract surfaces

ci_strict_gates_validation.rs:
- Add CI operator runbook token tests for certification remediation and
  PERF-3X gate incidents
- Add practical-finish, extension-remediation, parameter-sweeps gate wiring tests
- Add 10 new phase1 matrix weighted bottleneck claim integrity tokens

conformance_report.rs:
- Emit run_id and correlation_id in conformance summary with fallback
  resolution from CONFORMANCE_RUN_ID / CI_RUN_ID env vars
- Add 3 new tests for lineage field presence and format

ext_conformance/VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json:
- Update confirm-destructive.ts registrations (tools/commands/flags/
  event_handlers counts adjusted to match current extension surface)

ext_conformance_generated.rs:
- Add per-extension dummy API key injection for conformance scanning
- Add deny_env: false to PiJsRuntimeConfig for conformance compat

ext_memory_stress.rs:
- Guard against duplicate extension loads in shared runtimes with
  globalThis.__pi_mem_probe_seq sequence check

fault_injection_persistence.rs:
- Add readonly filesystem probe for root-capable environments
- Make assertions conditional on enforcement capability

perf_budgets.rs:
- Add phase1_matrix_validation_candidates() helper
- Add evaluate_phase1_weighted_attribution_contract() (~240 lines) for
  weighted bottleneck schema/status/lineage/output validation
- Add write_phase1_matrix_validation_artifact() fixture helper
- Add 4 new weighted attribution contract tests

qa_docs_policy_validation.rs:
- Add parse_identifier_after, resolve_f64_constant_in_source,
  parse_f64_or_resolved_const_after for constant resolution in source
- Add testing-policy practical-finish docs-last contract tests
- Add QA/CI runbook PERF-3X regression triage token tests
- Add user-facing diagnostics workflow token tests
- Extend claim_integrity tokens with 10 weighted bottleneck entries

release_readiness.rs:
- Add conformance lineage fail-closed check (run_id/correlation_id must
  be present in conformance summary)
- Add 2 new tests

Test fixtures added:
- tests/full_suite_gate/extension_remediation_backlog.json (v1 schema, empty backlog)
- tests/full_suite_gate/practical_finish_issues_snapshot.jsonl (29 open PERF-3X issues)
- tests/perf/reports/opportunity_matrix.json (blocked, no ranked opportunities)
- tests/perf/reports/parameter_sweeps.json (blocked, default sweep plan)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
